labs.title: Config Loader
labs.description: Build a config loader that reads from .env, validates with Pydantic, and provides typed access
labs.description_zh: 构建一个配置加载器，从 .env 读取配置，用 Pydantic 验证，提供类型安全的访问
labs.task: Implement a Settings class using pydantic-settings that loads from .env, validates types, and raises clear errors for missing required fields
labs.task_zh: 使用 pydantic-settings 实现一个 Settings 类，从 .env 加载配置，验证类型，对缺失的必填字段给出清晰的错误提示
acceptance: Settings loads values from .env file
Missing required fields raise ValidationError with clear message
Type coercion works (string 'true' becomes bool True)
Default values are applied when env var is missing
Settings can be imported and used as a singleton
labs.starter_code:
from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings

class Settings(BaseSettings):
    # TODO: add your config fields
    pass

labs.title: LLM API Client
labs.description: Build a robust LLM client with timeout, retry, and proper error handling
labs.description_zh: 构建一个健壮的 LLM 客户端，支持超时、重试和完善的错误处理
labs.task: Implement an LLMClient class that wraps OpenAI-compatible API calls with timeout control, HTTP status checking, response parsing, business error detection, and configurable retry with exponential backoff
labs.task_zh: 实现一个 LLMClient 类，封装 OpenAI 兼容 API 调用，支持超时控制、HTTP 状态码检查、响应解析、业务错误检测和可配置的指数退避重试
acceptance: Network timeout raises NetworkError within configured seconds
HTTP 5xx raises HTTPError with status code
Invalid JSON response raises ParseError
Business error code != 0 raises BusinessError
Successful response returns parsed content string
Retry attempts respect max_retries with exponential backoff
labs.starter_code:
import requests
from dataclasses import dataclass

class NetworkError(Exception): pass
class HTTPError(Exception): pass
class ParseError(Exception): pass
class BusinessError(Exception): pass

@dataclass
class LLMResponse:
    content: str
    model: str
    usage: dict

class LLMClient:
    def __init__(self, base_url: str, api_key: str, timeout: int = 30, max_retries: int = 3):
        # TODO: implement
        pass

    def chat(self, prompt: str, model: str = 'gpt-3.5-turbo') -> LLMResponse:
        # TODO: implement with timeout, error handling, retry
        pass

labs.title: FastAPI Service
labs.description: Build a FastAPI service with proper routing, schema validation, and dependency injection
labs.description_zh: 构建一个 FastAPI 服务，包含路由、Schema 验证和依赖注入
labs.task: Build a task management API with POST/GET/DELETE endpoints, Pydantic request/response models, and a dependency-injected service layer
labs.task_zh: 构建一个任务管理 API，包含 POST/GET/DELETE 端点、Pydantic 请求/响应模型和依赖注入的服务层
acceptance: POST /tasks creates a task and returns 201 with task data
GET /tasks returns list of all tasks
GET /tasks/{id} returns single task or 404
DELETE /tasks/{id} removes task and returns 204
Invalid request body returns 422 with validation error details
Service layer is injected via FastAPI Depends
labs.starter_code:
from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional

app = FastAPI()

# TODO: define models, service, and routes

labs.title: RAG Mini Pipeline
labs.description: Build a minimal RAG pipeline with document chunking, mock embedding, and top-k retrieval
labs.description_zh: 构建一个最小 RAG 流水线，包含文档分块、模拟嵌入和 top-k 检索
labs.task: Implement a RAG pipeline: split documents into chunks, generate mock embeddings (using hash-based vectors), and retrieve top-k relevant chunks for a query
labs.task_zh: 实现一个 RAG 流水线：将文档分割成块，生成模拟嵌入（基于哈希的向量），并为查询检索 top-k 相关块
acceptance: Documents are split into chunks of configurable size with overlap
Each chunk gets a mock embedding vector of consistent dimension
Query embedding is generated with same method as document embeddings
Top-k retrieval returns most similar chunks by cosine similarity
Pipeline handles empty documents gracefully

labs.title: Agent Tool Calling
labs.description: Build an agent that can plan, select tools, execute, and handle errors
labs.description_zh: 构建一个能够规划、选择工具、执行和处理错误的 Agent
labs.task: Implement an Agent with a tool registry, a planner that selects tools based on user intent, an executor that runs tools and handles errors, and a simple conversation loop
labs.task_zh: 实现一个 Agent，包含工具注册表、根据用户意图选择工具的规划器、运行工具并处理错误的执行器，以及简单的对话循环
acceptance: Agent registers tools with name, description, and callable
Planner selects appropriate tool based on user input
Executor runs tool and captures result or error
Unknown tool raises ToolNotFoundError
Tool execution error is caught and reported gracefully
Agent maintains conversation history

labs.title: Docker & CI
labs.description: Create a Dockerfile and GitHub Actions CI for a Python web service
labs.description_zh: 为 Python Web 服务创建 Dockerfile 和 GitHub Actions CI
labs.task: Write a multi-stage Dockerfile for a FastAPI app, and a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests, builds the image, and verifies it starts correctly
labs.task_zh: 为 FastAPI 应用编写多阶段 Dockerfile，以及一个 GitHub Actions 工作流，运行测试、构建镜像并验证启动正常
acceptance: Dockerfile uses multi-stage build (builder + runtime)
Final image is based on python:3.11-slim
Dependencies are installed from requirements.txt
App runs on port 8000 with health check
GitHub Actions workflow runs pytest on push
GitHub Actions builds Docker image and verifies startup
labs.starter_code:
# Dockerfile
FROM python:3.11-slim AS builder
# TODO: multi-stage build

# .github/workflows/ci.yml
# TODO: CI workflow
